name: citygs-remote-render-mvp
description: MVP scaffold for remote real-time server-side CityGS / 3D Gaussian Splatting rendering over the web.

scripts.build: npm --workspace @citygs/shared run build && npm --workspace @citygs/frontend run build && npm --workspace @citygs/signaling run build && npm --workspace @citygs/worker run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @citygs/shared run build && npm --workspace @citygs/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace @citygs/frontend run typecheck && npm --workspace @citygs/signaling run typecheck && npm --workspace @citygs/worker run typecheck
